Notes: Single UPDATE adds one RR to an existing RRset and then deletes the same RRset in the same message, probing whether the server evaluates delete_rrset against the pre-update state, the intermediate state, or rejects the internally contradictory update.

Steps.Description: Add y.campus.edu. TXT "new" and then delete the y.campus.edu. TXT RRset in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset is absent or contains the added TXT record after the UPDATE.
